code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn is_digit(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b >= 48 and b <= 57
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut have_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  mut first_out = true
  mut out = ""
  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws(line, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      mut sign = 1
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 45
          sign = -1
          i = i + 1
        else if b == 43
          i = i + 1
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      mut num = 0
      mut has_digit = false
      while i < n and is_digit(line, i)
        match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(b)
          num = num * 10 + (b - 48)
        when None
          ()
        end
        has_digit = true
        i = i + 1
      end
      if has_digit
        let value = num * sign
        if not have_prev or value != prev
          if first_out
            out = "#{value}"
            first_out = false
          else
            out = "#{out} #{value}"
          end
          prev = value
          have_prev = true
        end
      end
    end
  end
  println(out)
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    process(line)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
